plan.title: Friday: Lower Hypertrophy & Engine Builder
plan.focus: Leg hypertrophy through RDLs and Bulgarian Split Squats, followed by a high-intensity interval circuit.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min light BikeErg
2 sets: 10 band pull-aparts, 10 banded face pulls
2 sets: 15 air squats, 10 mountain climbers
2 sets: 10 dead bugs per side

sections.name: Strength - Lower Hypertrophy
exercises: Barbell Romanian Deadlift: 4 sets x 10 reps @ 135-185 lbs (Rest 90s between sets)
DB Bulgarian Split Squats (rear foot on bench): 3 sets x 12 reps per leg @ 25 lb DBs (Rest 90s between sets, 2 min before next movement)

sections.name: Conditioning - HIIT Metcon
exercises: EMOM 20 (Every Minute on the Minute for 20 minutes):
Minute 1: 15/12 Calorie BikeErg
Minute 2: 10 DB Snatches from floor (50 lb DB, switch hands each rep, no overhead lock-out)
Minute 3: 40 Single-Unders
Minute 4: 15 V-ups
Minute 5: Rest

sections.name: Core Finisher
exercises: 3 sets: 15 Russian Twists (50 lb DB), 20 Flutter Kicks (Rest 60s between sets)

plan.title: Saturday Zone 2 Endurance & Core
plan.focus: Sustained low-intensity steady-state cardio (HR 120-140 bpm) utilizing the weighted vest for increased caloric burn and postural strength.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 2 min easy Jump Rope (single unders)
2 rounds: 15 Band Pull-aparts (red band)
2 rounds: 15 Band Dislocates (red band)
2 rounds: 12 Dead Bugs (slow and controlled)

sections.name: Sustained Zone 2 Cardio
exercises: Wear 20 lb weighted vest for the entire duration of this block.
25 min BikeErg @ moderate pace (maintain 120-140 bpm).
20 min Walking Treadmill (flat) or Outdoor Walk @ 3.0-3.5 mph (maintain 120-140 bpm).
Note: Transition directly from bike to walk without removing the vest.

sections.name: Core Finisher
exercises: Rest 2 min after cardio, remove weighted vest.
3 sets: 15 Hanging Knee Raises (from squat rig)
3 sets: 20 Bicycle Crunches
3 sets: 30 second Hollow Hold
Rest 60s between sets.

plan.title: Monday Heavy Lower: Back Squat Focus
plan.focus: High-intensity squat strength followed by a CrossFit-style AMRAP emphasizing posterior chain and core stability.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 2 min Jump Rope (Single Unders)
2 rounds: 15 Red Banded Rows (seated on floor)
2 rounds: 15 Red Band Face Pulls (attached to rig at eye level)
2 rounds: 20 Air Squats + 10 Alternating Bird-Dogs

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Back Squat: 2 warm-up sets (10 reps @ empty bar, 8 reps @ 50% target)
Barbell Back Squat: 5 sets x 5 reps @ 75-80% 1RM (Max 225 lbs)
Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before conditioning

sections.name: Conditioning (Metcon)
exercises: 15-Minute AMRAP (As Many Rounds As Possible):
10 Dumbbell Power Cleans (50 lb DB, alternating arms - catch at shoulder)
20 Alternating Reverse Lunges (Bodyweight)
15 V-ups (Slow and controlled)
40 Double-unders (or 80 Single-unders)

sections.name: Cool Down
exercises: 2 min Calf Stretch (against rig)
2 min Pigeon Stretch per side
1 min Child’s Pose

plan.title: Upper Body Push/Pull Volume & Engine
plan.focus: Horizontal push and pull strength development followed by a high-intensity aerobic finisher.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 2 rounds: 200m light run or 1 min moderate BikeErg
2 rounds: 15 Red Band Face Pulls
2 rounds: 15 Red Banded Rows (standing)
2 rounds: 15 Sit-ups
2 rounds: 10 Scapular Push-ups

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Floor Press: 4 sets x 10 reps @ 135-155 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 2 min before next movement)
Single-Arm Dumbbell Row: 3 sets x 12 reps per side @ 50 lb DB (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before conditioning)

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: AMRAP 15 minutes:
12 Dumbbell Snatches (alternating, catch at shoulder due to low ceiling) @ 35 lb DB
12 Burpees
40 Double-unders (or 80 Single-unders)
20 Russian Twists (total) @ 25 lb DB
Rest 2 minutes post-AMRAP
Finisher: 3 sets of 30-second L-sit hold (using bench or floor) - Rest 60s between sets

plan.title: Zone 2 Cardiovascular Endurance Session
plan.focus: Sustained aerobic capacity building maintaining a heart rate of 120-140 bpm while incorporating functional core movement.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 5 min light BikeErg (steady pace)
3 sets: 15 Band Face Pulls (red band)
3 sets: 15 Windshield Wipers (lying on floor, slow control)

sections.name: Zone 2 Sustained Work
exercises: 20 min Concept 2 BikeErg @ steady pace (Target 120-140 bpm)
20 min Outdoor Walk or Treadmill Walk (flat) @ 3.0-3.5 mph (Target 120-140 bpm)
Note: Perform entire 40-minute block wearing the 20 lb weighted vest to increase aerobic demand without spiking heart rate above Zone 2 thresholds.

sections.name: Core Finishing Work
exercises: 3 sets: 20 V-ups (Rest 60s between sets)
3 sets: 15 Flutter Kicks (per leg, focus on lower ab engagement, Rest 60s between sets)

plan.title: Thursday Heavy Upper: Bench & Power Cleans
plan.focus: Heavy horizontal pressing and pulling strength followed by a high-intensity CrossFit-style power metcon.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 2 min BikeErg (Easy pace)
2 rounds: 15 Banded Rows (Red resistance band, pull to chest)
2 rounds: 15 Leg Raises (Lying on floor, slow control)
2 rounds: 10 Scapular Push-ups
2 rounds: 10 Cat-Cow stretches

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Bench Press: 5 sets x 5 reps @ 155-185 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 2 min before next movement)
Barbell Bent-Over Row (Underhand Grip): 4 sets x 8 reps @ 115-135 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before conditioning)

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: 15 Minute AMRAP (As Many Rounds As Possible):
8 Barbell Power Cleans (95-115 lbs - catch at shoulders, no overhead)
12 Hand-Release Push-ups
20 Sit-ups (Abmat style or butterfly)
40 Double-unders (or 80 Single-unders if unable to DU)
Note: No weighted vest for this piece to prioritize speed and movement quality. Rest 2-3 min after completion.

plan.title: Friday: Lower Hypertrophy & Vested Engine
plan.focus: High-volume posterior chain and quad work followed by a weighted-vest metcon.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 2 min Jump Rope (Single-unders)
2 rounds: 15 Red Banded Rows (anchor to rig), 15 Red Banded Good Mornings, 10 Barbell Ab-wheel Rollouts (slow and controlled)
2 rounds: 15 Air Squats, 10 Alternating Bird-Dogs

sections.name: Strength & Hypertrophy
exercises: Barbell Stiff-Leg Deadlift: 4 sets x 12 reps @ 135-155 lbs (Maintain slight bend in knees, focus on hamstring stretch and glute squeeze at the top)
Rest 90s between sets, 2 min before next movement
DB Front-Rack Reverse Lunges: 3 sets x 10 reps per leg @ pair of 25 lb DBs (Hold DBs at shoulders)
Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before conditioning (Prep 20 lb vest and 50 lb DB)

sections.name: Conditioning (HIIT)
exercises: Wear 20 lb Weighted Vest for the entire duration of this block.
AMRAP 15 Minutes:
- 10 DB Goblet Squats (50 lb DB)
- 10 Burpees
- 15 Calorie BikeErg
- 20 Sit-ups
Rest 3 min, then remove vest.
Cooldown: 5 min slow walk on treadmill (flat) or outdoor walk.

plan.title: Monday Heavy Lower: Front Squat Strength & Engine
plan.focus: Building quad-dominant strength with Front Squats and a high-intensity metcon focusing on unilateral volume and core stability.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 2 minutes Jump Rope (single unders)
2 rounds: 15 Red Banded Rows (focus on scapular retraction)
2 rounds: 12 Sit-ups
2 rounds: 10 Goblet Squats @ 35 lb DB
1 round: 10 Cat-Cow stretches + 30 seconds/side ankle mobility stretch

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Front Squat: 2 warm-up sets (10 reps @ empty bar, 8 reps @ 95 lbs)
Barbell Front Squat: 5 sets x 5 reps @ 135-225 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 2 min before next movement)
Dumbbell Step-ups to Bench: 3 sets x 10 reps per leg @ pair of 25 lb DBs (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before conditioning)

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: 15-Minute AMRAP (As Many Rounds As Possible):
12 Calorie BikeErg
10 Dumbbell Snatches @ 35 lb (alternate arms, catch at shoulder due to low ceiling)
15 Bodyweight Air Squats
8 Barbell Ab-Wheel Rollouts (use the 225 lb setup or lighter barbell)
Rest 2-3 minutes after AMRAP is complete for cool-down and equipment teardown

plan.title: Wednesday Zone 2 Aerobic Base & Core Stability
plan.focus: Sustained low-intensity steady-state (LISS) cardio to build aerobic capacity and core endurance.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 rounds for quality:
20 Banded Rows (seated on floor, red band around rig feet)
10 Lateral Shuffles per side (stay low, maintain control)
10 Bird-Dogs per side (slow and controlled, focus on balance)
1 min Easy BikeErg

sections.name: Sustained Zone 2 Cardio
exercises: 20 min Concept 2 BikeErg @ steady pace (Target HR 120-140 bpm)
20 min Outdoor Run/Jog or Flat Treadmill Walk @ 3.5 mph (Target HR 120-140 bpm)
Note: Maintain a conversational pace throughout. This session is unvested to allow for consistent movement mechanics compared to previous weighted sessions.
Rest 2 min before core finisher.

sections.name: Core Finisher
exercises: 3 sets for quality:
10 Barbell Ab-Wheel Rollouts (kneeling, using barbell with 10-25lb plates)
20 Russian Twists @ 25 lb DB (total reps, feet off floor)
15 Lying Leg Raises (lower back pressed firmly into floor)
Rest 90s between sets.

plan.title: Zone 2 Aerobic Foundation and Core Integrity
plan.focus: Sustained Zone 2 cardio with varied core stabilization

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 5 min light BikeErg (steady pace)
3 sets: 15 Band Dislocates (red band)
3 sets: 15 Band Pull-Aparts (red band)
2 sets: 10 Air Squats (focus on depth and posture)

sections.name: Sustained Zone 2 Aerobic Base
exercises: 20 min Concept 2 BikeErg @ steady pace (Target 120-140 bpm)
20 min Flat Treadmill Walk @ 3.2-3.5 mph (Target 120-140 bpm)
Note: Perform entire 40-minute block wearing 20 lb weighted vest to increase aerobic intensity while maintaining Zone 2 heart rate.

sections.name: Core Stability Finisher
exercises: 3 sets: 15 Hanging Knee Raises (from squat rig)
3 sets: 30-second Hollow Hold (arms extended overhead)
3 sets: 10 Bicycle Crunches per side (controlled tempo)
Rest 60s between sets
